validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

authShell.tagline: Where your team and AI work together
authShell.subtitle: Local agent + cloud collaboration — pick up your workflow anywhere.

register.createAccountDescription: Register a cloud account, then create or join an organization
register.verifyDescription: A verification code was sent to {email}. Enter the 6-digit code below.
register.verifyFailed: Verification failed, please check the code.

validation.passwordNotMatch: The two passwords do not match

authorize.backToDesktop: Please go back to the MeshBot desktop app and start the login again.

requestMissing.title: Incomplete link
requestMissing.description: The authorization link is missing its request parameter — it may have been copied incompletely.

invalid.title: Invalid authorization request
invalid.description: This authorization request does not exist or has already been handled.

expired.title: Authorization request expired
expired.description: The authorization request exceeded its 10-minute validity window and has expired.

alreadyProcessed.title: Request already handled
alreadyProcessed.description: This authorization request was already handled on another page.

confirm.title: Device requesting access
confirm.description: Device {deviceName} ({platform}) is requesting access to your account. Current organization: {orgName}

approved.title: Approved
approved.description: If the desktop app did not finish automatically, paste this code into the app.
approved.copyManually: Copy failed — please select the code and copy it manually.

fallback.hint: Automatic completion failed — copy the authorization code below and paste it into "Enter authorization code manually" on the desktop app.

onboarding.title: Join an organization first
onboarding.description: Before authorizing a device, create an organization or accept an invitation to join one.
onboarding.createFailed: Failed to create organization, please try again
onboarding.inviteTokenPlaceholder: Paste the invitation code you received
onboarding.joinFailed: Failed to join, please check the invitation code

orgSettings.noOrg: You haven't joined any organization yet
orgSettings.inviteFailed: Failed to send invitation, please try again
orgSettings.revokeConfirmDescription: The invitation link will stop working immediately — the recipient will no longer be able to use it to join the organization.
orgSettings.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke invitation, please try again
orgSettings.resendFailed: Failed to resend invitation, please try again

devices.title: Authorized devices
devices.revokeConfirmDescription: The device will lose access immediately and must be re-authorized to connect again.
devices.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke device, please try again

models.title: Model configurations
models.noOrg: You haven't joined any organization yet
models.fieldNameHint: Leave blank to auto-generate from provider and model
models.fieldApiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current key ({masked})
models.fieldBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default endpoint
models.fieldContextWindowPlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-detect from model
models.contextWindowPositive: Context window must be a positive integer
models.saveFailed: Failed to save, please try again
models.deleteConfirmDescription: This cannot be undone. Agents using this configuration will no longer be able to call this model.
models.deleteFailed: Failed to delete, please try again
models.toggleFailed: Failed to toggle enabled state, please try again

onboarding.modelStepDesc: Add a model configuration for your organization to start using MeshBot.
onboarding.modelBlockedDesc: Ask your organization owner to configure a model, then refresh.
onboarding.modelLoadErrorDesc: Something went wrong while loading your organization's model configuration. Please retry.

empty.title: Pick an Agent to start chatting
empty.description: Select a device Agent conversation on the left, or start a new one from the top-right.

picker.title: Choose a device Agent
picker.description: Pick one of your authorized devices to start chatting with its Agent.
picker.empty: No available devices. Sign in and authorize a device from the desktop app first.
picker.createFailed: Failed to create conversation, please try again

imConversation.historyError: Failed to load message history, please try again
imConversation.emptyDescription: Send {agent} a message to start the conversation
